data.title: Ryerson Holding Corp: Navigating Challenges, Focusing on Operational Improvements
data.description:
In the face of a challenging macro-metals and manufacturing environment, Ryerson Holding Corp (RYI) has demonstrated resilience and a strategic focus on operational improvements and market share growth. Despite reporting a net loss and declining sales in the fourth quarter of 2024, the company has made significant strides in bringing major capex projects online and launching its 'integration and optimization' phase. These milestones have contributed to the company's financial performance and future prospects.



Ryerson's strategic focus on operational improvements and market share growth has enabled the company to navigate through a challenging macro-metals and manufacturing environment. Despite a net loss and declining sales, Ryerson achieved several operational milestones that contributed to its financial performance. Here are some key points:

1. Capex cycle completion: Ryerson completed a record Capex cycle aimed at modernizing operations, which is expected to generate higher and less volatile earnings in the future. This investment cycle included the opening of a 900,000 square foot service center in University Park, IL, and the start-up of a service center modernization project in Shelbyville, KY. These investments are expected to generate higher and less volatile earnings in the future (Ryerson Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2024 Results, Feb 20, 2025).
2. Sales quote and order activity: Ryerson reported a significant increase in sales quote and order activity since mid-January, reaching the highest levels since Q2 2021. This indicates an improvement in demand and market share growth (Positive Points, Ryerson Holding Corp (RYI, Financial)).
3. Market share gains: Despite operating in a contractionary environment, Ryerson achieved market share gains in North America, particularly in stainless steel and aluminum. This growth was supported by the company's strategic focus on operational improvements and cost reduction plans (Positive Points, Ryerson Holding Corp (RYI, Financial)).
4. Operating expense reduction: Ryerson successfully reduced operating expenses by $60 million annually through cost reduction plans, including personnel and freight expenses. This reduction contributed to the company's financial performance and helped offset the impact of a challenging macro-environment (Positive Points, Ryerson Holding Corp (RYI, Financial)).
5. Cash flow generation: Ryerson generated $92 million in cash flow from operations in Q4 2024, maintaining a healthy liquidity profile with $451 million in available global liquidity. This strong cash flow generation demonstrates the company's ability to manage its finances effectively despite the challenging environment (Positive Points, Ryerson Holding Corp (RYI, Financial)).



Ryerson's 'integration and optimization' phase contributed to realizing $60 million in annualized expense reductions by further weaving capex, systems, and acquisition investments made over the past three years into a cohesive intelligent service center network. This initiative allowed the company to reduce operating expenses by $60 million annually through cost reduction plans, including personnel and freight expenses. The expected long-term benefits of this initiative include higher and less volatile earnings, as well as improved operational efficiency and customer experience. By operationalizing and integrating these assets into the network, Ryerson aims to generate returns on its extended Capex investment cycle.



In conclusion, Ryerson Holding Corp's strategic focus on operational improvements and market share growth has enabled the company to navigate through a challenging macro-metals and manufacturing environment. Despite a net loss and declining sales, Ryerson achieved several operational milestones that contributed to its financial performance. The company's completion of a record Capex cycle, increase in sales quote and order activity, market share gains, operating expense reduction, and strong cash flow generation demonstrate its ability to manage its finances effectively and drive long-term growth. As Ryerson continues to focus on operational improvements and market share growth, investors can expect the company to maintain a strong financial performance and future prospects.

data.title: "Remittix Leads Crypto Payments Race, Outshining Rivals in $12.6M Year"
data.description:
The crypto market is abuzz with competition among Remittix (RTX), Rexas Finance (RXS), Lightchain AI (LCAI), and Solaxy (SOLX), with investors showing a clear preference for Remittix's narrative. The blockchain sector has witnessed growth, but several projects have experienced decreased momentum, leading to billions of dollars in losses for investors.

Remittix has emerged as a leader in the crypto payments landscape, collecting over $12.6 million in 2025. The project's unique selling proposition lies in its ability to facilitate crypto-to-FIAT transactions and direct deposits into banks, eliminating the need for foreign remittance charges and offering same-day transaction processing.

Rexas Finance (RXS), on the other hand, has struggled to gain traction despite its initial promise of innovative DeFi solutions. The market conditions for DeFi have made it less attractive for investors, and RXS's lack of a clear real-world solution has put its survival at risk. Unlike Remittix, RXS does not have reputable institutional backing or a solid regulatory compliance strategy, making it less appealing to investors.

Lightchain AI (LCAI) has also faced challenges, despite its initial hype surrounding the hybridization of AI and blockchain. The project's AI-powered Proof-of-Intelligence consensus mechanism has failed to gain traction, with investors questioning the practical applications and real-world cases of AI-driven blockchain technologies. LCAI's lack of partnerships with major institutions has further hindered its growth potential.

Solaxy (SOLX) has encountered regulatory uncertainties in its pursuit of RWA tokenization. The project's lack of transparency and investor confidence has led to billions of dollars fleeing RWA tokens. In contrast, Remittix's payment model does not rely on speculation, making it a more attractive investment option for those seeking to cure the growing problem in finance.

Investors have chosen Remittix over RXS, LCAI, and SOLX due to its practical applications and specified business pathway. Remittix's ability to address worldwide financial needs has made it a standout project in the crypto market, despite the challenges faced by other projects in the sector.

data.title: Forum Energy Technologies: Navigating Market Challenges and Opportunities in 2025
data.description:
Forum Energy Technologies Inc (FET) recently released its fourth-quarter and full-year 2024 earnings, providing insights into the company's performance and outlook for the coming year. Despite facing market challenges, FET demonstrated resilience and strategic initiatives that position it for future growth. This article explores the key takeaways from the earnings call and the company's prospects for 2025.

Market Challenges and Opportunities

In 2024, FET faced a net loss of $135 million, primarily due to a non-cash, pre-tax intangible asset impairment of $119 million. Despite this impairment, the company's adjusted EBITDA increased by 49% year-over-year, reflecting improved operational efficiency. Neal Lux, President and CEO of FET, acknowledged the challenges but expressed confidence in the company's long-term outlook.



Strategic Initiatives and Market Share Growth

FET implemented the "Beat the Market" strategy in 2024, focusing on niche markets, innovative solutions, and leveraging its global manufacturing footprint. This strategy, combined with the Variperm acquisition, led to a 15% market share growth as measured by revenue per global rig. The company's strategic initiatives have positioned it well for future growth, despite the current market uncertainties.



Segment Performance and Outlook

The Drilling and Completions segment reported a 10% decrease in revenue, primarily related to lower capital equipment, wireline cable, and coiled tubing sales due to the decline in U.S. completions activity. Conversely, the Artificial Lift and Downhole segment saw a 7% increase in revenue, driven by higher demand for processing equipment technologies and artificial lift products.

For 2025, FET expects global drilling and completion activity to be down 2% to 5%. However, the company's forecast assumes it will overcome most, if not all, of the activity decline through market share gains. Therefore, full-year 2025 adjusted EBITDA and free cash flow guidance ranges are $85 to $105 million and $40 to $60 million, respectively.

Conclusion

Forum Energy Technologies Inc's 2024 performance reflects both the opportunities and challenges within the oil and gas industry. Despite facing market challenges, the company's focus on strategic investments and market share growth positions it well for future success. With a strong balance sheet and a commitment to returning capital to shareholders, FET is well-positioned to navigate the market uncertainties and capitalize on long-term growth prospects.

data.title: Elon Musk's Tesla and Uber: A Match Made in Robotaxi Heaven?
data.description:
In the ever-evolving world of autonomous vehicles and ride-sharing, one question has been on the minds of investors and tech enthusiasts alike: will Elon Musk's Tesla team up with Uber to roll out robotaxis? Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi recently spilled the beans, hinting at a potential partnership that could revolutionize the industry. Let's dive into the possibilities and implications of this potential alliance.



First, let's address the elephant in the room. Elon Musk has been vocal about Tesla's plans to launch its own robotaxi service, which could potentially compete with Uber. However, Khosrowshahi has expressed optimism about a potential partnership, emphasizing that no one wants to compete against Tesla if they can help it. So, what's in it for both companies if they decide to join forces?

1. Economies of Scale: Uber could provide Tesla with an established platform to reach a larger customer base, reducing the need for Tesla to invest in building its own app and infrastructure. This is similar to how Waymo operates through the Uber app in some cities. (Source: Khosrowshahi's comments about McDonald's working with Uber Eats and DoorDash)
2. Variable Demand: Uber's platform could introduce variable demand to Tesla's autonomous vehicle (AV) ecosystem, helping to optimize the utilization of Tesla's robotaxi fleet. (Source: Khosrowshahi's interview with Bloomberg TV)
3. Safety and Regulatory Compliance: By partnering with Uber, Tesla could leverage Uber's experience in navigating regulatory environments and ensuring safety standards for its AV operations. (Source: Implied from Uber's AV strategy and partnerships)



However, a partnership between Tesla and Uber is not without its challenges. Some Wall Street investors have been nervous about the future of Uber and Lyft's business model, which currently relies on a large population of human drivers that are quickly matched with riders. The launch of Tesla robotaxis and the broader rollout of Waymo rides could hurt Uber's ride volume growth and lower the commission rate it can make, according to Bloomberg Intelligence.

Moreover, Tesla's robotaxi initiative aims to place autonomous vehicles on the roads of Austin, Texas, a city already familiar with autonomous vehicle operators. If Tesla decides to build its robotaxi service alone, it could become a direct competitor to Uber in the ride-sharing market, potentially impacting Uber's ride volume growth and commission rates.

In conclusion, a potential partnership between Tesla and Uber for robotaxi deployment could offer strategic benefits such as economies of scale, variable demand, safety, and revenue generation. However, it could also present potential drawbacks like competition, dependence on Uber's platform, data sharing, and brand perception. Both companies would need to carefully evaluate these factors before making a decision.

As the autonomous vehicle and ride-sharing industries continue to evolve, the potential partnership between Tesla and Uber remains an intriguing possibility. Investors and tech enthusiasts alike will be watching closely to see if this match made in robotaxi heaven becomes a reality.

data.title: UGI Corporation: The Top Performing Utilities Stock in 2025?
data.description:
UGI Corporation (UGI) has been making waves in the utilities sector, with its strong performance in the first quarter of 2025 catching the attention of investors. As the company reported its fiscal Q1 earnings, it became evident that UGI's strategic initiatives and operational improvements have positioned it as a standout performer in the sector. This article will delve into the factors contributing to UGI's impressive performance and explore whether it can maintain its momentum in the long term.

Strong Performance in Q1 2025

UGI Corporation reported GAAP diluted EPS of $1.74 and adjusted diluted EPS of $1.37 in the first quarter of 2025, marking a 14% increase over the prior-year period. The company's reportable segments' earnings before interest expense and income taxes (EBIT) totaled $420 million, slightly lower than the $425 million reported in the prior-year period. Despite the slight decrease in EBIT, UGI's adjusted diluted EPS growth highlights the company's strong performance during the quarter (UGI, 2025).

Factors Contributing to UGI's Performance

1. Natural Gas Demand and Higher Gas Rates: UGI's natural gas businesses benefited from strong gas demand and higher gas rates at the West Virginia gas utility. This increase in demand and rates contributed to the company's solid performance in the utilities sector (UGI, 2025).
2. Improved Operational Performance at AmeriGas: A renewed focus on operational performance at AmeriGas, UGI's propane distribution subsidiary, led to a 14% increase in adjusted diluted EPS over the prior year. This improvement was driven by disciplined execution within the natural gas and international propane businesses (UGI, 2025).
3. Tax Planning Strategies: Benefits from the company's continuing tax planning strategies also contributed to the strong fiscal first quarter results. These strategies help optimize UGI's tax liabilities, leading to improved financial performance (UGI, 2025).

Comparison with Other Utilities Stocks

To assess UGI's performance relative to other utilities stocks, we can examine the average earnings growth, revenue change, and dividend yield for a selection of companies in the sector. Based on the provided data, UGI's earnings growth of 14% outperforms the average earnings growth rate of -0.44% for the selected utilities stocks. Additionally, UGI's dividend yield of 5.3% is higher than the average dividend yield of 3.87% for these stocks. This comparison suggests that UGI has been performing well compared to its peers in terms of earnings growth and dividend yield.

Geopolitical Events and Macroeconomic Indicators

Geopolitical events and macroeconomic indicators have played a significant role in shaping UGI Corporation's performance, particularly in its international operations. Changes in global energy policies, trade agreements, and economic growth rates in key markets can impact the demand for energy products and services, affecting UGI's revenue and profitability. By monitoring and adapting to these factors, UGI can better position itself to capitalize on opportunities and mitigate risks in the global energy market.

UGI's Future Prospects

UGI Corporation's strong performance in the first quarter of 2025 demonstrates the company's ability to execute on its strategic initiatives and operational improvements. As UGI continues to focus on enhancing its business processes, commercial practices, and service quality, particularly at AmeriGas Propane, it is well-positioned to deliver consistent growth and greater value for its shareholders. However, the company's long-term success will depend on its ability to maintain its focus on operational improvements, optimize tax liabilities, and adapt to changes in gas demand and prices.

In conclusion, UGI Corporation's impressive performance in the first quarter of 2025 can be attributed to specific factors such as strong gas demand and higher gas rates, improved operational performance at AmeriGas, and tax planning strategies. While UGI's performance compares favorably to other utilities stocks in terms of earnings growth and dividend yield, its long-term prospects will depend on the company's ability to maintain its focus on operational improvements and adapt to geopolitical events and macroeconomic indicators. As UGI continues to execute on its strategic initiatives, it has the potential to remain a top performer in the utilities sector.

data.title: Lazarus Group Consolidates Bybit and Phemex Stolen Funds
data.description:
The hacker behind the Bybit exchange incident has begun consolidating funds with those stolen from Phemex, according to on-chain detective ZachXBT. The Lazarus Group, suspected of being behind the Bybit hack, has mixed the funds from the initial theft addresses of both incidents directly on-chain.

ZachXBT, known for his expertise in tracking cryptocurrency-related activities, shared this information on Twitter. The Lazarus Group, a North Korean hacking organization, is believed to be responsible for numerous high-profile cyber attacks, including the 2014 Sony Pictures hack and the 2016 Bangladesh Bank heist.

The Bybit hack, which occurred in March 2022, resulted in the loss of approximately $33 million in cryptocurrencies. The Phemex hack, which took place in December 2021, saw the theft of around $80 million in digital assets. The consolidation of these funds suggests that the hacker is attempting to cover their tracks and make it more difficult for law enforcement to trace the stolen assets.

This development highlights the growing threat posed by sophisticated hacking groups to the cryptocurrency industry. As the value of digital assets continues to grow, so too does the incentive for cybercriminals to target exchanges and other vulnerable points in the ecosystem. The Lazarus Group's involvement in the Bybit hack further underscores the need for robust security measures and international cooperation in combating these threats.

data.title: Tech Titans Tumble: High Trading Volumes Highlight Sell-Off in Major Stocks
data.description:
1. Nvidia (Nasdaq: NVDA)
Nvidia dropped solidly by -4.05%, with the trading volume of 31.01B. NVIDIA launched the NVIGI SDK to advance AI innovation in gaming, while CEO Jensen Huang addressed misunderstandings regarding DeepSeek. He emphasized that changes in AI training will amplify demand for NVIDIA's computational power.

2. Tesla (Nasdaq: TSLA)
Tesla dropped solidly by -4.68%, with the trading volume of 25.14B. China's SAIC Motor is hiring for key positions in its passenger car segment, while Tesla is recalling 376,000 vehicles in the U.S. Nissan's credit rating was downgraded to junk by Moody's following a failed merger with Honda.

3. Palantir Technologies (NYSE: PLTR)
Palantir Technologies dropped solidly by -4.63%, with the trading volume of 13.40B. Loop Capital initiated coverage of Palantir with a buy rating and a target price of $141. The U.S. Department of Defense's planned budget cuts have possibly impacted Palantir, with expectations of a disappointing first-quarter performance and CEO Alex Karp's new stock trading plan.

4. Apple (Nasdaq: AAPL)
Apple dipped mildly by -0.11%, with the trading volume of 13.07B. Apple quietly launched the iPhone 16e with AI features targeting the mid-range market, boosting production capacity in India to meet local and global demand. Meanwhile, Apple plans to relocate manufacturing from Mexico to the U.S. and introduces new software updates.

5. Amazon (Nasdaq: AMZN)
Amazon.Com dipped mildly by -2.83%, with the trading volume of 11.99B. Tesla, NVIDIA, Intel, Netflix, Alphabet, Amazon, Microsoft, Meta Platforms, and Apple experienced significant declines, with Tesla dropping over 4% and Amazon acquiring creative rights for future James Bond films. UnitedHealth, Walmart, and other major Dow Jones components also fell.

6. Microsoft (Nasdaq: MSFT)
Microsoft dipped mildly by -1.90%, with the trading volume of 10.98B. Microsoft released a new snipping tool with video trimming, plans updates for Windows 11 start menu, and introduced new features through the Windows 11 Beta channel. Microsoft aims to revolutionize the gaming industry with a human action model, but developers are skeptical.

7. Meta Platforms (Nasdaq: META)
Meta Platforms dipped mildly by -1.62%, with the trading volume of 10.71B. Meta has partnered with Georgia Tech on VR/AR training for robots, launched a $50M VR creator fund and Horizon Worlds editor, and announced a $1M VR/MR development competition. Additionally, Meta increased executive bonuses and reduced employee stock options by 10%.

8. Alibaba Group Holding Limited (NYSE: BABA)
Alibaba Group Holding Limited gained solidly by 5.72%, with the trading volume of 10.54B. Alibaba's USD convertible bond reached a record high, driven by AI interest and strong earnings. The company’s 2031 convertible bond rose approximately 38% this year, signaling market confidence in Alibaba’s growth and AI investments.

9. Unitedhealth Group Incorporated (NYSE: UNH)
Unitedhealth Group Incorporated plunged by -7.17%, with the trading volume of 9.10B. UnitedHealth Group has been impacted by news of a reported U.S. Department of Justice investigation into its insurance billing practices, resulting in significant stock declines. The company denied these claims as misinformation. Additionally, UnitedHealth is offering voluntary buyouts to some employees in response to cost pressures.

10. Alphabet (Nasdaq: GOOGL)
Alphabet dipped mildly by -2.65%, with the trading volume of 6.35B. Google A disclosed six insider transactions on February 21, 2025, with executive Porat Ruth selling 5,855 shares on that date. The company is also under potential EU scrutiny for violating the Digital Markets Act.

data.title: Lazarus Group Suspected in Bybit Hack: 5000 ETH Laundered via eXch and Chainflip
data.description:
The cryptocurrency world has been abuzz with news of a suspected hacker from the Lazarus Group moving funds from the Bybit hacker address. On-chain sleuth ZachXBT reported that the hacker transferred 5000 ETH to a new address and initiated a laundering process through a centralized mixer, eXch. The funds were then transferred to the Bitcoin network via Chainflip.

This development comes as a reminder of the ongoing threat of hackers targeting cryptocurrency exchanges. The Lazarus Group, a North Korean hacking organization, has been linked to several high-profile cryptocurrency hacks in the past. The group is known for its sophisticated tactics and ability to evade detection.

The use of a coin mixer in this case is a common tactic employed by hackers to obfuscate the origin of the stolen funds. Coin mixers work by combining the hacker's funds with other users' funds, making it difficult to trace the original source of the money.

ZachXBT's discovery highlights the importance of on-chain analysis in detecting and preventing cryptocurrency-related crimes. As the cryptocurrency industry continues to grow, so too does the need for robust security measures and vigilant monitoring.

In response to the incident, Bybit has not yet issued an official statement. However, the exchange has been known to take swift action in the past to protect its users and their funds. It remains to be seen how Bybit will address this latest development.

data.title: Strike Launches Callback Phone Support for Enhanced User Experience
data.description:
Strike, a leading digital asset platform, has announced the launch of its callback phone support service. This new feature is designed to enhance user experience and provide an additional channel for customers to seek assistance. The callback service will allow users to request a call back from Strike's support team at their convenience, ensuring that they receive the help they need in a timely manner.

The launch of this new service comes as Strike continues to expand its offerings and attract a growing user base. The company has been focusing on providing a comprehensive and user-friendly platform for digital asset trading and management. With the addition of callback phone support, Strike is further demonstrating its commitment to customer service and satisfaction.

Strike's callback phone support service is now available to all users, regardless of their location. The company has invested in a robust infrastructure to ensure that calls are routed efficiently and that users receive prompt assistance. Strike's support team is available to help with a wide range of issues, from account setup to trading and technical support.

The launch of callback phone support is part of Strike's broader strategy to provide a seamless and convenient user experience. The company has been continuously innovating and expanding its offerings to meet the evolving needs of its customers. Strike's platform now offers a wide range of features, including real-time market data, advanced trading tools, and secure storage solutions for digital assets.

Strike's callback phone support service is just one example of the company's commitment to customer service and satisfaction. As the digital asset industry continues to grow and evolve, Strike is positioning itself as a leader in the space, offering a comprehensive and user-friendly platform for traders and investors.

data.title: "1Fuel Token: 15,000% ROI Potential in Cross-Chain Revolution"
data.description:
Crypto investors are buzzing about a new token, 1Fuel (OFT), which has the potential for a staggering 15,000% return on investment (ROI). The token, priced at $0.018, is currently in its presale phase and has attracted investors from established crypto communities such as XRP and KAS.

The appeal of 1Fuel lies in its unique cross-chain transaction feature, which allows users to swap tokens across multiple networks with just one click. This, coupled with its in-built privacy mixers and cold-storage solutions, has drawn the attention of XRP and KAS investors, who are known for their expertise in spotting projects with advanced transaction utility and scalability.

The crypto market has seen impressive growth in recent years, with several new tokens reaching significant heights. The potential for 1Fuel to achieve a 15,000% ROI is a testament to the market's unpredictable nature and the opportunities it presents for investors.

Rumors are circulating about two upcoming centralized exchange (CEX) listings for 1Fuel. If these talks materialize, it could dramatically increase the token's liquidity and expose it to a broader audience, including retail and institutional investors. This could lead to even more dramatic price surges for 1Fuel.

Innovation and strategic growth are the driving factors behind XRP and KAS investors' shift to 1Fuel. With the potential for two major CEX listings on the horizon, 1Fuel is poised to become a major utility token in the larger crypto market.

data.title: Bybit's $4 Billion Fund Inflow: A Vote of Confidence in Crypto Recovery
data.description:
In the past 12 hours, Bybit, a leading cryptocurrency exchange, has witnessed a significant fund inflow of over $4 billion. This substantial influx of capital has successfully covered the entire fund gap created by a recent hacking incident.

The exchange's on-chain security team, TenArmor, has been closely monitoring the situation and has confirmed that the fund inflow includes 63,168.08 ETH, 3.15 billion USD of USDT, 173 million USD of USDC, and 525 million USD of CUSD. This data indicates a strong recovery in the exchange's liquidity and a vote of confidence from its users.

Following the hack, Bybit has swiftly restored all its services, including the withdrawal function, ensuring minimal disruption to its users' trading activities. This quick response demonstrates the exchange's commitment to maintaining a secure and reliable trading environment.

The cryptocurrency market has been closely watching the developments at Bybit, as the exchange's ability to recover from the hack and maintain user trust is seen as a crucial test for the industry's resilience. The significant fund inflow and the exchange's prompt response to the incident have been widely praised by industry observers.

As the cryptocurrency market continues to evolve, exchanges like Bybit play a crucial role in maintaining market stability and fostering innovation. The exchange's ability to quickly recover from the hack and restore user confidence is a testament to its commitment to the industry and its users.

data.title: Ripple CEO Hails SEC's Coinbase Dismissal, XRP Bulls Hopeful
data.description:
Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse has applauded the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for dropping its lawsuit against Coinbase, expressing optimism that this could signal a positive shift for XRP. The SEC's decision to dismiss the case against Coinbase has sparked speculation among market participants about the possibility of the agency dropping its lawsuit against Ripple, which could potentially trigger an XRP price surge.

Garlinghouse praised the new SEC leadership under Acting Chair Mark T. Uyeda for taking quick actions and not waiting for the permanent chair to be confirmed by the US Senate. He highlighted the agency's shift away from the previous administration's "regulation by enforcement" approach, suggesting that XRP holders have reason for optimism. Many believe that a dismissal of the case against Ripple could lead to a major bullish run for XRP.

Adding to the bullish signals, the SEC's recognition of Grayscale's 19b-4 filing for a spot XRP exchange-traded fund (ETF) has been interpreted by some as the agency supporting the expansion of XRP's footprint. This recognition, along with the SEC's recent actions, has raised hopes among XRP holders that the agency may be more supportive of the cryptocurrency.

At press time, XRP is trading at $2.58, down nearly 3% over the past 24 hours. The price sits below the 20-day Exponential Moving Average (EMA) of $2.63, suggesting a short-term bearish trend. Traders are closely watching the 20-day EMA, as many believe it presents major resistance that needs to become support for further upside.

The Relative Strength Index (RSI) for XRP price action reads a value of 46.97, suggesting neutral to bearish momentum. The gradient of the RSI line indicates that XRP could soon retest lower support levels. However, the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicator offers a slightly more nuanced picture. While the MACD line remains above the signal line, and the MACD histogram remains green, the low intensity of the histogram bars points to waning bullish momentum.

data.title: Trump Administration Eyes Mineral Rights Deal With Ukraine Amid Rising Tensions: 'We're Signing An Agreement'
data.description:
The Trump administration is exploring a potential mineral rights deal with Ukraine, as the country seeks to leverage its vast reserves of critical minerals to secure continued American military aid. The proposed agreement, which could barter access to Ukraine's mineral resources for continued U.S. support, has raised concerns about security guarantees and the potential impact on global supply chains.

Ukraine possesses significant deposits of rare earth elements, lithium, titanium, and other strategic minerals that are crucial for industries such as defense, high-tech, aerospace, and green energy. These resources align with U.S. strategic interests by providing an alternative source of critical materials, enhancing energy security, and supporting the transition to renewable energy technologies.

The proposed deal could have significant implications for the global supply chain of critical minerals, particularly in the context of ongoing geopolitical tensions and competition between the U.S. and China. By diversifying its supply chain for critical minerals, the U.S. can reduce its reliance on China, which is currently the world's largest producer of rare earth elements. This would help mitigate the risks associated with relying on a single supplier, especially one that is a geopolitical rival.

Strengthening U.S.-Ukraine relations through a successful mineral rights deal would also provide Ukraine with continued military aid, helping the country defend itself against Russian aggression and support its recovery after the war. Additionally, the deal could enhance Europe's energy transition by providing access to critical raw materials, reducing Europe's reliance on Russian energy, and accelerating its energy transition.

However, investing in Ukraine's mineral industry presents several potential risks and challenges, given the ongoing conflict with Russia and the need for security guarantees. The primary concern for companies interested in investing in Ukraine's mineral industry is the lack of security guarantees. U.S. companies have expressed interest but need assurances that their investments will be protected in the event of renewed conflict.

Geopolitical uncertainty, limited geological data, capital-intensive industry, onerous state policies, and dependence on U.S. military aid are additional risks and challenges that investors must consider. Addressing these risks and challenges will require a comprehensive approach that addresses security concerns, provides accurate geological data, streamlines regulations, and ensures long-term U.S. support.

In conclusion, the Trump administration's exploration of a mineral rights deal with Ukraine presents an opportunity to diversify the U.S. supply chain for critical minerals, strengthen U.S.-Ukraine relations, enhance energy transitions, counter Chinese influence, and support Europe's energy transition. However, addressing the potential risks and challenges associated with investing in Ukraine's mineral industry will be crucial for the success of any such deal.

data.title: Trump's Military Shakeup: Tradition Broken, Retired Officer Nominated as Top Military Officer
data.description:
President Donald Trump's decision to dismiss top military officials, including the first Black chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, General Charles 'CQ' Brown, has sent shockwaves through the military community. In a departure from tradition, Trump has nominated a retired officer, Air Force Lt. Gen. Dan Caine, as the new chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff. This move has significant implications for the military's leadership dynamics, decision-making processes, and public perception.



The dismissal of General Brown, along with other senior officers such as Adm. Lisa Franchetti and Gen. Jim Slife, has raised concerns about the politicization of the military and the potential erosion of trust and cohesion among the ranks. Brown, who was a strong advocate for diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) in the military, was seen as a target for some commentators and lawmakers due to his openness to these initiatives. His removal sends a message that prioritizing DEI may not be valued by the highest levels of leadership, potentially discouraging other officers from championing these initiatives.

The nomination of a retired officer, Air Force Lt. Gen. Dan Caine, as the new chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff is a departure from tradition. Traditionally, the CJCS position has been held by an active-duty officer, with the current chairman serving until their retirement. Caine's nomination as a retired officer could lead to concerns about the continuity and stability of military leadership. Additionally, his retirement may limit his understanding of the current operational environment and the needs of active-duty personnel, potentially influencing decision-making processes.

The replacement of these officers with individuals who may be more aligned with the administration's political agenda could lead to policies that prioritize political considerations over military effectiveness and professionalism. This could further politicize the military and create an environment where officers feel pressured to prioritize political considerations over professional military judgment.



In conclusion, President Trump's decision to dismiss top military officials and nominate a retired officer as the new chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff has significant implications for the military's leadership dynamics, decision-making processes, and public perception. The military and the public will need to assess the implications of this departure from tradition and monitor the impact on decision-making processes and public perception. As the military faces new challenges and opportunities, it will be crucial for the leadership to maintain a balance between political considerations and professional military judgment.

data.title: Wall Street Wobbles: Tech Sell-off and Walmart Woes Spark Bearish Market Signals
data.description:
U.S. stock markets experienced a downturn as major technology stocks faced significant sell-offs, with retail giant Walmart issuing warnings about slowing sales growth, leading to concerns about a potential stalling in consumer spending. The S&P 500 Index ended the day down 0.4%, significantly impacted by Walmart's substantial market capitalization loss following profits that fell short of expectations.

Initial sharp declines saw the S&P 500 fall by 1%, before recovering slightly with assistance from a rebound in Nvidia’s stock. The tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 Index also slid 0.5%, weighed down by notable declines in major players such as Amazon, Tesla, and Meta. Concerns were exacerbated by mixed earnings reports from various U.S. retailers, paired with fears surrounding the potential expansion of trade tariffs threatened by President Trump.

The banking sector contributed to the overall market decline, as key financial stocks such as JPMorgan Chase and Goldman Sachs both fell by over 3.8%. The KBW Bank Index also mirrored this trend with a decline of 2.4%. Market strategists warned that both retail and institutional investors seem to be losing the momentum that has propelled the market, suggesting a likely shift towards a bearish phase for U.S. equities.

Adding to the downward pressure, long-term inflation expectations among U.S. consumers have reached their highest in three decades. Recent reports indicate a spike in home prices to new records accompanied by a sharp drop in real estate sales, raising broader economic concerns. Scepticism towards the future of the economy is further fueled by statistics hinting at pervasive inflationary pressures tied to tariff hikes under current policies.

In terms of economic outlook, influential market voices are voicing caution, forecasting potential economic deceleration in the U.S. during the second half of the year. This sentiment reflects broader apprehension regarding the enduring impacts of trade policies and regulatory changes, coupled with ongoing geopolitical risks. As such, investors remain attuned to economic indicators and policy shifts which could further influence the volatile market landscape.

data.title: "Crypto Aftermath: Top Korean Altcoins Surge Amidst Market Volatility"
data.description:
The recent $1.5 billion Ethereum (ETH) heist on the Bybit exchange, linked to the North Korean hacker group Lazarus, has sent shockwaves through the crypto market. As investors brace for potential ETH sell-offs, they are seeking alternative cryptocurrencies to mitigate risks. Here, we explore the top three Korean altcoins with strong potential to perform well amidst market volatility.

The $1.5 billion Bybit hack led to a 2% drop in the total crypto market cap to $3.17 trillion. Despite this dip, three altcoins have emerged as promising investments due to their resilience and potential for swift recovery.

Pi Network Token (PI) has garnered significant market interest since its launch, making it an attractive investment option. Despite the broader market pullback, Pi Coin has risen by 8.5% to trade at $0.756. The altcoin has rebounded from its all-time low of $0.61, registered on February 20, 2025, and is targeting resistance at $0.80. A swing above this level could lead to gains past $1, paving the way for a rally to its all-time high of $3.4.

Ripple (XRP) has maintained a bullish outlook despite recent market fluctuations. XRP price today trades at $2.58 and continues to defend support at an ascending channel, suggesting a bullish continuation. After bouncing from the lower trendline of the ascending parallel channel, XRP needs to flip the midline for a sustained uptrend to the upper trendline. The key resistance level to watch for this altcoin is $2.83.

Bitcoin (BTC) has outperformed the altcoin market in the last month, making it one of the best cryptocurrencies to buy after the Bybit hack. Bitcoin's dominance has gradually risen and recently reached its highest level since 2021. When Bitcoin's dominance rises, it shows that BTC is outperforming altcoins or that its declines have been marginal compared to those of altcoins. Such a rise also indicates that crypto investors are moving from riskier altcoins to Bitcoin.

Traders looking for the best crypto to buy after the Bybit hack can explore Pi Network Token, XRP, or Bitcoin. These coins have a strong bullish

data.title: RE/MAX Holdings Inc (RMAX) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong International Growth and Strategic Initiatives
data.description:
RE/MAX Holdings Inc (RMAX) recently held its Q4 2024 earnings call, highlighting strong international growth and strategic initiatives that have positioned the company for resilience amidst market fluctuations. The company's international agent count increased by 8.7% year-over-year, reaching over 70,000 agents, demonstrating the brand's expanding global footprint and resilience in diverse markets. This growth is particularly notable given the 7% decline in U.S. agent count and a 5% reduction in Motto Mortgage offices, indicating the company's ability to mitigate the impact of downturns in key markets.

The company's international expansion strategy has been driven by several initiatives and investments, including:

1. Global expansion and franchise sales: RE/MAX Holdings has focused on expanding its global footprint by opening new franchise locations and increasing its presence in international markets. This expansion has contributed to the growth in agent count and revenue.
2. Investment in technology platforms: The company has continued to invest in technology platforms like BoldTrail and its flagship websites, remax.com and remax.ca. These investments aim to enhance agent productivity, improve the consumer experience, and diversify revenue streams. The company's focus on technology has likely contributed to its ability to attract and retain agents in international markets.
3. Settlement agreement in Canadian antitrust litigation: RE/MAX Holdings reached a substantial agreement on monetary terms and business practice changes in Canadian antitrust litigation. This settlement reduces uncertainty and potential future liabilities, allowing the company to focus on growth and expansion efforts.



The settlement agreement in Canadian antitrust litigation has a significant impact on RE/MAX Holdings' long-term strategic planning and financial outlook. The agreement substantially reduces uncertainty and potential future liabilities for the company, enabling it to focus on its core business operations and growth strategies. The monetary terms and business practice changes agreed upon in the settlement provide a clear path forward for the company, enabling it to plan and execute its long-term strategic initiatives more effectively. Additionally, the settlement agreement helps to mitigate the risk of further regulatory changes, which could have had a negative impact on the company's financial outlook. By resolving this litigation, RE/MAX Holdings can now concentrate on driving growth and improving its financial performance.

In conclusion, RE/MAX Holdings' strong international growth and strategic initiatives have positioned the company for resilience amidst market fluctuations. The company's focus on global expansion, investment in technology platforms, and resolution of the Canadian antitrust litigation has contributed to its ability to maintain a stable agent count and revenue stream, even when facing headwinds in its primary markets. As the company continues to execute its strategic initiatives, investors should monitor its progress and consider the potential opportunities that lie ahead.

data.title: Ukraine's Economic Struggle: The Vanishing U.S. Backing
data.description:
As the war against Russia enters its third year, Ukraine finds itself in a precarious position, with the U.S. backing seemingly on the wane. The Ukrainian economy, battered and bruised by the ongoing conflict, is now facing the prospect of reduced financial and material support from its key ally. This article explores the potential implications of a decrease in U.S. backing for Ukraine's economy and examines alternative sources of financial and material support.

The U.S. has been a significant contributor to Ukraine's financial and material support, providing over $113 billion in security assistance and economic aid since 2014. However, the pace of U.S. aid has slowed in recent months, raising concerns about the sustainability of Ukraine's recovery and reconstruction efforts. A decrease in U.S. backing could lead to a shortfall in funding, potentially slowing down the country's recovery and undermining its ability to resist Russian aggression.



To mitigate the impact of a decrease in U.S. backing, Ukraine could explore alternative sources of financial and material support. The European Union (EU) has been a significant contributor to Ukraine's recovery, providing over €17 billion in macro-financial assistance and humanitarian aid since 2014. With Ukraine's potential EU accession, the EU could play an even more significant role in supporting Ukraine's economy. The EU's Ukraine Facility, for example, aims to provide €18 billion in grants and low-interest loans to support Ukraine's recovery and reform efforts.

International financial institutions (IFIs) such as the World Bank and the International Monetary Fund (IMF) could also provide additional financial support to Ukraine. The World Bank, for instance, has already committed $4.5 billion in grants and low-interest loans to support Ukraine's recovery. The IMF has provided a $1.3 billion Stand-By Arrangement to Ukraine to help stabilize its economy and support its recovery efforts.



Attracting private investment from both domestic and international sources could also help bolster Ukraine's economy. This could involve improving the business environment, strengthening property rights, and enhancing the rule of law. Additionally, Ukraine could explore public-private partnerships (PPPs) to leverage private sector resources and expertise in supporting the country's recovery.

Confiscation of Russian assets frozen in the West could provide another source of funding for Ukraine's recovery. According to the Ukrainian government, the total value of frozen Russian assets could reach up to $300 billion. If successfully confiscated and repatriated, these assets could provide a significant source of funding for Ukraine's reconstruction and recovery.



The Ukrainian diaspora, estimated to be around 6 million people worldwide, could also play a role in supporting Ukraine's economy. The diaspora could provide financial contributions, invest in Ukrainian businesses, and share their expertise and skills to support the country's recovery.

In conclusion, a decrease in U.S. backing could have a significant impact on the Ukrainian economy. To mitigate this impact, Ukraine could explore alternative sources of financial and material support, such as increased EU support, IFI assistance, private investment, confiscation of Russian assets, and engagement with the Ukrainian diaspora. By diversifying its sources of support, Ukraine can help ensure the long-term success of its recovery and reconstruction efforts.

data.title: 'Fast Money' traders talk today's market sell-off
OKX Blacklists Bybit Hacker Address, Offers Support
data.description: OKX CEO Hong Fang has announced that the hacker address involved in the recent Bybit breach has been added to OKX's blacklist. The OKX team is closely monitoring these addresses and will take immediate action if any funds are moved. Additionally, the OKX team is in contact with the Bybit team to provide any IT security and liquidity support they can offer at this time.
